message:
perf(combinator): pre-allocate collections and use O(1) containers

Five combinator modules with the same category of improvement: replace
default-capacity Vecs/BTreeMaps with pre-sized allocations, and swap
ordered containers for hash-based ones where iteration order is unused.

- bulkhead.rs: BTreeMap → HashMap for BulkheadRegistry (name→bulkhead
  lookup is unordered); Vec::with_capacity(max_queue) for the permit
  wait queue, avoiding incremental growth under contention.
- first_ok.rs: Vec::with_capacity(total) for the failures collection
  in first_ok_outcomes, since worst case is all-fail.
- map_reduce.rs: Vec::with_capacity(total) for successes in
  map_reduce_outcomes; BTreeSet → HashSet for the success_indices set
  used to locate the first error index (only operation is contains).
- quorum.rs: Vec::with_capacity(total) for both successes and failures
  in quorum_outcomes.
- race.rs: SmallVec<[(usize, Outcome); 4]> for loser_outcomes in
  race_all_outcomes, avoiding heap allocation when there are <= 4
  losers (the common case for retry/failover patterns).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
